race.description: Sky Racing Fillies And Mares Class 3 Handicap
race.comment: CINDERSEA (3) is a consistent conveyance who is yet to miss the top-four in seven starts to date and gets in well at the weights with the 2kg claim. Out of an astute yard and should be right there at the business end. JENCHICK BOOM (5) goes well for rider Jones who has a win and four placings from just six steers. Ready to peak now fourth run back from the spell and can play a major role in the outcome. DIVINE SOURCE (9) was a dominant Ipswich winner at the latest outing and successful jockey Thornton stays on top. Top-three credentials. The well-related TROUNCE (7) (half to G1 winner Booker) is a last-start winner who only needs some luck navigating from the sticky draw to be featuring in the finish. CORDINA (8) also hails from a handy family (half to G1 winner Farnan) and shouldn't be underestimated.
